how_to_obtain: Each RTK check-point capture produces a record in the device export: per-point coordinate, fix_type at capture moment, receiver-estimated sigma (H/V precision), correction age at capture, fix hold duration, PDOP, satellite count, CN0, antenna info. CB_X exports full set; Trimble/Emlid exports subset depending on export config; OTHER variable.

Session-level log: download confirmation, signature/integrity verification, session boundaries. CB_X expected-present with signature; Trimble/Emlid expected-present without signature; OTHER expected-absent.

Structured field form filled per occupation: device_type, antenna setup, baseline length, NTRIP mountpoint, expected mountpoint, target/mark info, accuracy target. Operator-declarative fields (mark_integrity_confirmed, tilt_compensation_used on non-tilt-comp gear, mark_photo_captured) are advisory only — zero scoring weight per Concern 5.
